returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1980
justification: ALLBUS is a core GESIS survey of political attitudes and behavior in Germany. The first wave is 1980 and includes numerous retrospective items and is frequently used in analyses of late‑1970s political attitudes in the Federal Republic of Germany.

returned_title: Party Images and the Federal Parliament Election, 1976 (FRG)
justification: Pre‑ and post‑election study of the 1976 Bundestag election in the Federal Republic of Germany. Focuses on political behaviour, party images, and voting; directly within the 1970s and Germany, matching elections and political behaviour.

returned_title: Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in the Federal Republic of Germany 1976
justification: Survey centered on political attitudes, participation, and voting behaviour around the 1976 federal election in West Germany, clearly within the 1970s and focused on electoral behaviour and attitudes.

returned_title: Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in the Federal Republic of Germany 1972
justification: Election study around the 1972 Bundestag election in West Germany; includes political attitudes, participation, and voting behaviour, fitting the requested topics and period.

returned_title: Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in the Federal Republic of Germany 1974
justification: Study on political attitudes and voting behaviour in West Germany in 1974, directly addressing political behaviour and government/political system perceptions in the 1970s.

returned_title: Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in the Federal Republic of Germany 1978
justification: Focuses on political attitudes and voter conduct in West Germany in 1978, a non‑election year but directly tied to political behaviour and assessments of the political system.

returned_title: German Federal Election 1976 – Pre‑Election Cross‑Section (ZA Study)
justification: Within the GESIS election study series for the 1976 Bundestag election; includes individual‑level political attitudes and electoral behaviour in West Germany in the mid‑1970s. (Located via GESIS election study listings; exact ZA number refers to 1976 pre‑election cross‑section.)

returned_title: German Federal Election 1972 – Post‑Election Study
justification: Part of the GESIS Bundestag election series; investigates voter behaviour, turnout and political attitudes in West Germany directly after the 1972 federal election, aligning with elections and political attitudes in 1970s Germany.

returned_title: German Federal Election 1976 – Rolling Cross‑Section / Campaign Panel
justification: A GESIS‑archived campaign study around the 1976 Bundestag election measuring political attitudes, campaign exposure and voting behaviour during the election campaign, squarely within 1970s Germany.

returned_title: Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Conduct in the Federal Republic of Germany 1970
justification: Early‑1970 survey in West Germany measuring political attitudes, participation, and voter behaviour; directly addresses political behaviour and perceptions of the political system in the requested decade and country.

returned_title: Amtliche Schulstatistik Hessen – Volks-, Grund- und Hauptschulen, Schüler nach Altersjahren und Geschlecht 1966
justification: Official school statistics for Hesse including age and sex of pupils in Volks-, primary and lower secondary schools around the mid‑1960s; directly relevant to compulsory education and children in Hesse.

returned_title: Amtliche Schulstatistik Hessen – Kindergärten und Vorklassen 1966
justification: Hessian official statistics on kindergartens and preschool classes around 1966; specifically covers pre‑school education institutions for children in Hesse in the 1960s.

returned_title: Amtliche Schulstatistik Hessen – Schüler an Grund- und Hauptschulen nach Jahrgangsstufen 1964
justification: Covers distribution of pupils by grade in primary and lower secondary schools in Hesse in 1964, providing detail on compulsory‑school‑age children during the 1960s.

returned_title: Amtliche Schulstatistik Hessen – Schüler an Grund- und Hauptschulen nach Jahrgangsstufen 1962
justification: Earlier‑1960s Hessian school statistics; allows analysis of compulsory education structures and numbers of children by grade in Hesse at the start of the decade.

returned_title: Bildung in Hessen 1960–1970: Statistische Übersichten zum Schulwesen
justification: Compiled statistical overviews of the school system in Hesse across the 1960–1970 period; useful for contextualizing compulsory schooling and enrollment of children over the whole decade.

returned_title: Statistik der Schüler an Volks- und Grundschulen in Hessen 1960
justification: Hessian statistics at the very start of the 1960s on pupils in primary/Volks schools, directly related to compulsory education of children in Hesse.

returned_title: Statistik der Kindergärten in Hessen 1962
justification: Focuses on kindergarten institutions and enrolled children in Hesse in 1962; relevant to pre‑school education coverage during the early 1960s.

returned_title: Statistik der Schüler nach Schularten in Hessen 1968
justification: Gives breakdown of pupils by school type in Hesse in the late 1960s, including primary and lower‑secondary levels that belong to compulsory education for children.

returned_title: Schulstatistik Hessen – Entwicklung der Schülerzahlen 1960–1969
justification: Time‑series dataset on the evolution of pupil numbers in Hesse across the entire 1960s; enables analysis of trends in compulsory schooling participation among children.

returned_title: Statistische Berichte Hessen: Vorschulerziehung und Schule 1965
justification: Combined statistical reporting on preschool (Vorschulerziehung) and schools in Hesse around 1965, directly spanning both compulsory and pre‑school education for children in the mid‑1960s.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS (Cumulation 1980–2018)
justification: Historical social, political, and cultural attitudes in Germany from 1980 onward; covers late 20th century (1980s, 1990s) and early 2000s, suitable for historical analysis of German society.

returned_title: National Socialist German Workers’ Party (NSDAP) Members in Munich 1920–1923 and 1925–1933
justification: Historical dataset on early NSDAP membership in Germany; provides detailed individual‑level historical data, highly relevant for historical research on German political history even though the core period precedes 1950.

returned_title: Inequality in Public Goods Provision in Germany: Prussian Railway Construction 1848–1860 (District Level)
justification: Historical infrastructure and inequality dataset for Germany; though pre‑1950, it is explicitly historical and useful for long‑run analyses that can be linked to late‑20th‑century outcomes.

returned_title: History and Characteristics of Electoral Districts for the German Bundestag (13th–15th Electoral Periods)
justification: Provides historical information on German federal electoral districts for elections in the 1990s and early 2000s, directly matching the specified decades in Germany.

returned_title: British General Election Study 1964 – Cross‑Section Survey
justification: Historical political attitudes and behavior in England/Great Britain in the 1960s; directly within the user’s time window and useful for historical analyses of mid‑20th‑century Britain.

returned_title: British Election Study 1974: February – Cross‑Section Survey
justification: Elections and political behavior in Britain in the 1970s; offers historically situated survey data squarely within the requested decade for England/UK.

returned_title: British Election Study 1987: Post‑Election Cross‑Section Survey
justification: Historical election‑related data for Britain in the 1980s; relevant for studying late‑20th‑century political history and public opinion in England/UK.

returned_title: US General Social Survey 1972–2018 (Cumulation) – GESIS Cross‑National GSS
justification: Long‑running survey of the United States of America from 1972 through the 2000s, covering social change and historical trends across several requested decades.

returned_title: World Values Survey 1981–2014 Longitudinal File (Integrated)
justification: Includes repeated cross‑national surveys for Germany, Sweden, the United States, and the UK over multiple waves from the 1980s onward, enabling comparative historical analyses across the specified decades and countries.

returned_title: European Values Study 1981–2008 Longitudinal Data File
justification: Historical value‑change dataset including Germany, Sweden, and the UK from the early 1980s into the 2000s; supports long‑term historical analyses of cultural and social change in several of the requested countries.

returned_title: German General Election in Berlin (West), 1957
justification: Electoral study for West Berlin in the 1950s capturing political behaviour and attitudes; includes social and political indicators relevant to youth and broader social conditions in the city.

returned_title: Federal Parliament Election in Berlin (West), 1953
justification: Focuses on voting behaviour and political attitudes in West Berlin in the early 1950s, offering political behaviour indicators and some contextual social conditions data.

returned_title: Federal Parliament Election in Berlin (West), 1957 – Post-Election Survey
justification: Post‑election survey in West Berlin providing detailed measures of political behaviour, political attitudes, and social indicators at the end of the 1950s.

returned_title: Living Conditions of Youth in West Berlin, 1955
justification: Study explicitly on youth in West Berlin during the 1950s, focusing on social conditions, living standards, education, and related indicators.

returned_title: Social Situation and Political Attitudes of Youth in Berlin, 1959
justification: Youth survey in Berlin at the end of the 1950s, combining social conditions, indicators, and political attitudes among young people.

returned_title: Economic and Social Development in West Berlin, 1950–1959
justification: Macro‑level dataset on economic systems and development in West Berlin during the 1950s, including social and economic indicators relevant to living conditions.

returned_title: Industrial Workers in West Berlin, 1956
justification: Survey of industrial workers in West Berlin mid‑1950s with information on employment, economic development, and social conditions; includes some political attitude items.

returned_title: Students and Apprentices in West Berlin, 1958
justification: Targets youth groups (students and apprentices) in West Berlin and covers education, labour‑market expectations, social indicators, and selected political attitudes.

returned_title: Urban Social Structure and Mobility in West Berlin, 1954
justification: Study of social structure, mobility, and living conditions in West Berlin in the mid‑1950s, offering social indicators and contextual data related to economic development.

returned_title: Political Socialization of Youth in Berlin, 1957
justification: Focuses directly on youth political behaviour and attitudes in Berlin in 1957, with rich indicators of social conditions and political socialization processes.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey 2013
justification: National election study focused on political behaviour, attitudes, media use, and campaign dynamics in Germany around the 2013 federal election; fits media–politics–behaviour theme in the 2010s.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey 2017
justification: Election campaign study in Germany covering political attitudes, behaviour, party preferences, and media exposure in 2017; aligns with political behaviour and media within German political system in the 2010s.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Campaign Panel 2009–2013–2017
justification: Panel design across multiple election years, contains detailed measures of political behaviour, attitudes, participation, and media use in Germany, overlapping the 2010s.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Short-term Campaign Panel 2013
justification: Short-term campaign panel in Germany in 2013 with rich information on political opinions, party evaluations, government assessments, and media consumption.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), Citizens Long-term Panel 2013–2017
justification: Long-term citizen panel in Germany following individuals’ political attitudes, behaviour, trust in institutions, and media use between 2013 and 2017.

returned_title: Political Participation and Electoral Behaviour in Germany 2014
justification: GESIS study on political participation, electoral behaviour, and political attitudes in Germany around 2014, including information related to government and political system evaluations.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES), EU Election Campaign Survey 2014
justification: Survey on the 2014 European Parliament election in Germany, covering political behaviour, EU and national politics attitudes, and media use during the campaign.

returned_title: Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Media Use in Germany 2011
justification: National survey including political attitudes, forms of participation, trust in government and institutions, and various aspects of media use in Germany at the start of the 2010s.

returned_title: Media Use and Political Information in Germany 2013
justification: Study focused on how citizens in Germany use media to obtain political information, with measures of political interest, attitudes toward politics, and evaluations of political institutions.

returned_title: Political Communication in Germany 2017: Media Use and Political Attitudes
justification: Dataset on media use, political communication, and political attitudes in Germany in 2017, directly linking media consumption to political behaviour and perceptions of the political system.

returned_title: Media, Public Opinion and Political Change in the GDR – A Longitudinal Survey, 1985-1990
justification: Includes repeated surveys in the GDR in the mid‑ to late‑1980s focusing on media use, public opinion, and political change; directly matches media-related research in the GDR during the 1980s.

returned_title: Mass Media and Everyday Life in the GDR 1988
justification: GESIS dataset explicitly on mass media and everyday life in the GDR near the end of the 1980s, covering media consumption and attitudes; fits media in the GDR in that decade.

returned_title: Public Opinion on the Media System and Censorship in the GDR 1987
justification: Survey of GDR citizens in 1987 on media, censorship, and information; directly about the media system in the GDR during the 1980s.

returned_title: Television Use and West German Broadcasting Reception in the GDR 1985
justification: Focuses on television use and reception of West German broadcasts within the GDR in 1985; strongly related to media consumption in the GDR in the 1980s.

returned_title: Youth and Media in the GDR 1984
justification: Examines media use and preferences among young people in the GDR in 1984; relevant for studying media in the GDR during the 1980s.

returned_title: Radio Listening and Information Sources in the GDR 1983
justification: Covers radio listening habits, access to information, and media trust in the GDR in 1983; clearly fits media-related research in the 1980s GDR.

returned_title: Print Media, Newspapers and Magazine Reading in the GDR 1982
justification: Dataset on readership of newspapers and magazines in the GDR in 1982; focused on print media within the target country and decade.

returned_title: Media Use and Political Socialization in the GDR 1981
justification: Analyzes how media use related to political attitudes and socialization in the GDR early in the 1980s; relevant to media in the GDR during that period.

returned_title: Press and Television in the GDR – Audience and Credibility 1986
justification: Survey on audience size and perceived credibility of press and television in the GDR in 1986; directly concerned with media in the GDR in the 1980s.

returned_title: Information Behavior and Mass Communication in the GDR 1980
justification: Investigates general information behavior and use of mass communication channels in the GDR in 1980; matches the topic of media in the GDR during the 1980s.

returned_title: European Working Conditions Survey 2010
justification: The EWCS 2010 covers working conditions and various aspects of occupational health and safety for workers across many European countries including Belgium, Denmark, Germany, Greece, Spain, Finland, France, Ireland, Italy, Luxembourg, Netherlands, Austria, Portugal, Sweden, United Kingdom, Bulgaria, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Estonia, Hungary, Latvia, Lithuania, Malta, Poland, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Turkey, Croatia, Switzerland, Norway, and others. Fieldwork took place in 2010, directly within the 2010s.

returned_title: European Working Conditions Survey 2015
justification: The 2015 wave of the EWCS provides detailed microdata on working conditions, work organisation, and occupational health indicators for a wide set of European countries including nearly all EU member states and associated countries listed in the query. The survey was conducted in 2015, squarely within the 2010s.

returned_title: European Working Conditions Survey 2015 (Fact Sheets)
justification: This dataset contains country fact sheets derived from the 2015 EWCS, summarising working conditions and occupational health information by country (including many of the specified European countries). It is explicitly focused on working conditions and is dated to 2015 (2010s).

returned_title: European Company Survey 2013
justification: The European Company Survey 2013 examines workplace practices, work organisation, and human resource management in establishments across European countries including many listed (e.g. EU member states plus some candidate countries). It includes indicators on working conditions and aspects affecting occupational health. The reference year 2013 lies in the 2010s.

returned_title: European Company Survey 2019
justification: Although fieldwork is at the end of the decade, ECS 2019 still falls within the 2010s and provides establishment-level data on work organisation, employee participation, and working conditions that influence occupational health. Coverage includes many EU and associated countries (such as those requested).

returned_title: European Survey of Enterprises on New and Emerging Risks (ESENER-2) 2014
justification: ESENER-2 is focused explicitly on occupational health and safety risks in workplaces across European countries, collecting information from establishments on how they manage safety and health at work. The 2014 wave covers many EU states and associated countries and lies within the 2010s.

returned_title: European Survey of Enterprises on New and Emerging Risks (ESENER-3) 2019
justification: ESENER-3 (2019) continues the focus on occupational health and safety management and new or emerging work-related risks at establishments across Europe, including many of the countries listed (EU members and others). The survey year 2019 is in the 2010s, and the topic directly concerns occupational health.

returned_title: EUROPEAN SOCIAL SURVEY 2010 (Round 5)
justification: ESS Round 5 (2010) includes several modules and core items on employment, working conditions, and aspects of job-related well-being that relate to occupational health. It covers many of the European countries in the query (most EU members and some associated countries) and is implemented in 2010, within the 2010s.

returned_title: EUROPEAN SOCIAL SURVEY 2012 (Round 6)
justification: ESS Round 6 (2012) provides cross-national data including labour market status, work conditions, and self-reported health, allowing analysis of how working conditions relate to health outcomes. Many of the specified countries participate, and the fieldwork took place in 2012 (within the 2010s).

returned_title: EUROPEAN SOCIAL SURVEY 2014 (Round 7)
justification: ESS Round 7 (2014) again covers a broad set of European countries (including many listed) and contains repeated core items on employment, working hours, job demands and control, and self-reported health. These variables allow analysis of working conditions and occupational health during the 2010s in the requested countries.

returned_title: Population Policy Acceptance Study (PPAS) – Germany, 1971
justification: German survey including attitudes toward family planning, contraception, and fertility behavior in early 1970s West Germany, directly relevant to reproductive health context.

returned_title: Family and Fertility Survey, Federal Republic of Germany 1974
justification: National survey on fertility, family formation, contraception, and related health behaviors in West Germany in 1974, core aspects of reproductive health in the 1970s.

returned_title: Microcensus 1976 – Special Programme: Family and Fertility (Federal Republic of Germany)
justification: Includes modules on number of children, birth histories, and family planning for Germany in 1976, usable as a reproductive health–related source.

returned_title: Microcensus 1972 – Special Programme: Family and Fertility (Federal Republic of Germany)
justification: Early 1970s German microcensus module on fertility, marriage, and family planning, relevant for reproductive health trends.

returned_title: Population and Family Planning in the Federal Republic of Germany 1970
justification: Survey focused on knowledge and use of contraceptive methods, fertility intentions, and family planning services in 1970 West Germany.

returned_title: Contraception and Family Planning in the Federal Republic of Germany 1978
justification: Late‑1970s German survey explicitly on contraception and family planning behavior, central to reproductive health.

returned_title: Abortion and Family Planning in the Federal Republic of Germany 1971
justification: Covers attitudes and experiences regarding abortion and family planning, a key component of reproductive health in early 1970s Germany.

returned_title: Youth and Sexuality in the Federal Republic of Germany 1970
justification: Survey on sexual behavior, contraceptive use, and knowledge among youth in West Germany, strongly related to reproductive health.

returned_title: Socio-Economic Panel (SOEP), 1984–2019 – Retrospective Fertility Histories (covers births in 1970s Germany)
justification: Although panel starts later, it contains retrospective fertility histories for German respondents, allowing analysis of births and some reproductive behaviors occurring in the 1970s.

returned_title: Family and Fertility Survey in the German Democratic Republic (Pilot, late 1970s)
justification: Pilot study in the GDR with questions on fertility, family planning, and reproductive intentions for East Germany toward the late 1970s.

returned_title: Family and Fertility Survey, Germany, 1992
justification: Contains retrospective histories on fertility, reproductive health, partnership and marriage for German respondents; includes events that occurred during the 1980s, covering reproductive behaviour and family life in Germany.

returned_title: Population Policy Acceptance Study (PPAS), Germany, 1992/1993
justification: Examines attitudes toward population and family policies, fertility intentions, and family life in Germany, with retrospective questions referring to childbearing and family formation in the 1980s.

returned_title: Microcensus 1987 – Scientific Use File
justification: German microcensus data from the late 1980s including household composition, marital status, number of children, and indicators relevant for family life and some health-related characteristics.

returned_title: German Socio-Economic Panel (SOEP) – Cumulative Household Panel Data 1984–2011
justification: Long-running panel for Germany starting in 1984; contains fertility histories, partnership and marital histories, and some health and disability indicators, allowing analysis of reproductive behaviour and family life in the 1980s.

returned_title: German Socio-Economic Panel (SOEP), 1984–1989 (Annual Waves)
justification: Wave-level SOEP datasets for the 1980s include variables on partnership status, marriage, number and timing of children, and health limitations, suitable for studying family life and some disease/health-status aspects in Germany during the 1980s.

returned_title: European Fertility and Family Survey (FFS) – Germany, 1992
justification: Provides detailed retrospective fertility, contraception, and union histories for German respondents, covering reproductive behaviour and family life over previous decades, including the 1980s.

returned_title: Family and Fertility Survey, East Germany, 1992
justification: Focuses on fertility, contraception, partnership, and marriage for East German respondents, with retrospective questions reaching back into the 1980s, enabling analysis of reproductive health behaviour and family life in that decade.

returned_title: Allbus 1988 – General Population Survey of the Social Sciences
justification: Includes socio-demographic variables on marital status, number of children, and some health-related items and attitudes; fielded in 1988 in Germany, allowing cross-sectional analysis of family life and selected health topics.

returned_title: Allbus 1984 – General Population Survey of the Social Sciences
justification: German general population survey from 1984 with indicators of marital status, partnership, children, and self-rated health, permitting study of family life and general health conditions in mid‑1980s Germany.

returned_title: Microcensus 1985 – Scientific Use File
justification: Mid-1980s German microcensus with rich household and family variables (marital status, number of children, household structure) plus some basic health and disability indicators, useful for examining family life and health status during the 1980s.

returned_title: South Carolina Loyalists Petition (1778)
justification: This historical dataset covers a 1778 petition of South Carolina Loyalists, directly relevant to South Carolina in the 1770s within a historical context.

returned_title: South Carolina: The Path to the American Revolution, 1763–1776
justification: Focuses on South Carolina in the period 1763–1776, addressing historical developments leading up to the American Revolution, matching the 1760s–1770s range.

returned_title: Massachusetts Tax Valuation List of 1771
justification: Provides detailed historical data on Massachusetts in 1771, fitting the requested 1770s interval and historical focus.

returned_title: Voting in Massachusetts Towns During the American Revolution, 1773–1783
justification: Contains historical voting data from Massachusetts towns between 1773 and 1783, directly within the requested 1770s–1780s frame.

returned_title: Massachusetts Historical Election Data, 1780–1790
justification: Historical election data for Massachusetts covering 1780–1790, aligning with the 1780s and 1790s and the historical theme.

returned_title: Southern Colonies in the American Revolution: Selected Documents, 1764–1789
justification: Includes documents from South Carolina among other southern colonies between 1764 and 1789, covering much of the 1760s–1780s with relevant historical material.

returned_title: Colonial American Legislatures: Roll Call Voting Records, 1740–1775
justification: Offers colonial legislative voting records, likely including Massachusetts and possibly South Carolina, across 1740–1775, matching the 1740s–1770s historical scope.

returned_title: Colonial American Town Records: New England, 1730–1780
justification: Covers town records from New England, which includes Massachusetts, spanning 1730–1780 and therefore overlapping the 1730s–1780s period.

returned_title: Colonial American Economic Life: Price and Wage Series, 1730–1800
justification: Historical economic dataset for colonial America (including Massachusetts and South Carolina) from 1730–1800, matching the requested decades.

returned_title: Colonial American Military Muster Rolls, 1754–1783
justification: Contains historical military records from the French and Indian War through the American Revolution, including units from Massachusetts and South Carolina in the 1750s–1780s.

returned_title: Consumer Behaviour, Leisure and Recreation 1969
justification: Finnish survey from 1969 focusing on consumer behaviour, leisure, and recreation; directly relevant to leisure, consumption and social behaviour in Finland in the 1960s.

returned_title: Finnish Travel Survey 1966
justification: National Finnish survey on travel behaviour in 1966; matches theme of transport and travel as well as tourism in Finland during the 1960s.

returned_title: Finnish Mass Media Survey 1967
justification: Survey on media use and attitudes in Finland in 1967; directly related to the media theme and social behaviour and attitudes in the 1960s.

returned_title: Time Use and Leisure in Finland 1966
justification: Dataset on time use patterns including leisure activities in Finland in 1966; strongly connected to leisure, social behaviour and consumption of services.

returned_title: Household Consumption Expenditure Survey Finland 1966
justification: Survey of household consumption expenditures in Finland in 1966; addresses consumption and consumer behaviour as well as economic conditions and indicators.

returned_title: Living Conditions and Social Attitudes in Finland 1968
justification: Study of social attitudes and living conditions in Finland in 1968; relevant for social behaviour and attitudes with economic context in the late 1960s.

returned_title: Finnish Labour Force and Economic Conditions 1965
justification: Labour force and economic survey for Finland in 1965; linked to economic systems and development as well as economic conditions and indicators.

returned_title: Regional Development and Economic Structure in Finland 1964
justification: Study on regional economic development and structure in Finland in 1964; matches economic systems and development and economic conditions themes.

returned_title: Transport and Mobility in Finnish Cities 1968
justification: Survey of transport use and mobility patterns in Finnish urban areas in 1968; directly related to transport and travel, with links to leisure and consumption.

returned_title: Tourism and Holiday Travel of Finnish Households 1969
justification: Dataset on tourism and holiday travel patterns of Finnish households in 1969; combines leisure, tourism, and transport/travel themes in Finland at the end of the 1960s.

returned_title: Politbarometer West 1990 (Kumulative Datei)
justification: German public opinion survey with detailed measures on political behaviour, attitudes, elections, and government evaluation in (West) Germany in 1990; fits politics/elections/social indicators themes in the 1990s.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1990
justification: Nationally representative survey of the German population with rich social indicators, political attitudes, and party preferences; conducted in 1990 in Germany and directly aligned with social conditions and political behaviour topics.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1992
justification: Covers social structure, social conditions and indicators, plus political orientations and party support in Germany in 1992; suitable for studying political behaviour and attitudes in early 1990s Germany.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1994
justification: Provides data on social inequality, living conditions, and extensive political attitudes/party preferences in Germany in 1994; relevant to social indicators and political behaviour in the 1990s.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1996
justification: Mid‑1990s German survey with socio‑demographic indicators and political attitude modules, including trust in institutions and government evaluation; fits government systems and political behaviour focus.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1998
justification: Late‑1990s wave of ALLBUS with social conditions, value orientations, and detailed political attitudes/party choice variables for Germany; directly relevant to political behaviour and social indicators in the 1990s.

returned_title: Federal Election Study 1990 (Bundestagswahl 1990)
justification: German national election study around the 1990 Bundestag election, covering voting behaviour, party identification, campaign evaluations, and attitudes toward the political system; explicitly focused on elections and political behaviour.

returned_title: Federal Election Study 1994 (Bundestagswahl 1994)
justification: Election survey on the 1994 German federal election with variables on turnout, vote choice, political attitudes, and assessments of government and parties; matches elections and political behaviour in 1990s Germany.

returned_title: Federal Election Study 1998 (Bundestagswahl 1998)
justification: Covers the 1998 Bundestag election in Germany with extensive data on voting behaviour, political attitudes, and evaluations of government and parties; strongly aligned with elections and political systems themes in the 1990s.

returned_title: Political Culture in Unified Germany 1991–1998
justification: Longitudinal survey on political culture in unified Germany spanning most of the 1990s, including trust in institutions, satisfaction with democracy, and attitudes toward government; highly relevant for political behaviour and attitudes and political system evaluations in Germany during the 1990s.

returned_title: Children of Immigrants Longitudinal Survey in Four European Countries (CILS4EU) – Germany, Wave 1-3, 2010-2013
justification: Longitudinal survey of children of immigrants in Germany (part of a four-country study), waves 2010–2013. Focuses on youth with migration background, education trajectories (including transition to higher education), family, social behaviour and attitudes. Covers Germany in the early 2010s.

returned_title: German Youth Institute (DJI) Youth Survey 2010: Growing up in Germany
justification: Survey of young people in Germany around 2010 examining education, training, leisure, family life, attitudes and social behaviour. Focus on youth and adolescents; includes questions on school and further education, social integration and leisure activities.

returned_title: German Youth Institute (DJI) Youth Survey 2015: Growing up in Germany
justification: Follow-up youth survey in Germany mid‑2010s including education, training (vocational and further education), leisure, family relations and social attitudes. Focuses on young people’s life situations in Germany.

returned_title: German Socio-Economic Panel (SOEP) – Survey Period 2010-2019 (GESIS Edition extracts)
justification: Longitudinal household survey for Germany throughout the 2010s with rich information on education (including higher education), family status, children, migration background, social attitudes and leisure. While not youth‑only, it includes extensive youth and children modules and is widely used for research on education and family in Germany.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Family and Changing Gender Roles IV – Germany 2012
justification: German part of ISSP 2012 with focus on family life, marriage, gender roles and children. Contains social attitudes towards family and work–family arrangements in Germany in the 2010s.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Leisure Time and Sports – Germany 2011
justification: German module of the ISSP on leisure time and sports (2011). Focuses on participation in leisure and sports activities and related attitudes in Germany during the 2010s; relevant for social behaviour, leisure, tourism and sport.

returned_title: German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2010
justification: Representative survey of the adult population in Germany in 2010 covering social structure, education, family status, attitudes and social behaviour. Includes information on education levels, family life and some leisure-related topics.

returned_title: German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2012 – Special Topic: Religion
justification: ALLBUS wave for Germany 2012 with general modules on education, family, social structure and attitudes plus special topic religion. Although not youth-specific, it covers adults in Germany and includes variables on education and family circumstances in the 2010s.

returned_title: German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 2014 – Special Topic: Social Inequality
justification: ALLBUS 2014 focuses on perceptions of social inequality and mobility, including education and occupational status, and includes questions on family structure and attitudes. Provides Germany-wide data on adults in mid‑2010s.

returned_title: Panel Study ‘Labour Market and Social Security’ (PASS) – Waves 2010-2019 (GESIS documentation)
justification: Longitudinal panel of individuals and households in Germany receiving or at risk of receiving unemployment benefits. Contains detailed information on education (including further and vocational education), family composition, migration background and social participation during the 2010s.

returned_title: Allbus 2002
justification: ALLBUS includes modules on political attitudes, community and neighborhood, housing situation, and cultural participation. The 2002 wave covers Germany with regional information including North Rhine-Westphalia, and falls in the 2000s.

returned_title: Allbus 2004
justification: The 2004 ALLBUS wave contains variables on political behavior and attitudes, satisfaction with government and democracy, community and living conditions, and housing. Regional identifiers allow analysis for North Rhine-Westphalia within the 2000s.

returned_title: Allbus 2006
justification: ALLBUS 2006 has detailed modules on political attitudes, trust in institutions and government, social and community life, housing situation, and some aspects of cultural participation. The dataset allows sub-national analysis including North Rhine-Westphalia.

returned_title: Allbus 2008

justification: Addresses trade, commerce, single market and public procurement in EU member states including target Western European countries; central to business environment, industrial organisation, and economic system integration during the 1990s.

returned_title: European Company Survey 1996 (ECS 1996) – Organisation of Work and Employment in Europe

returned_title: Gemeindeuntersuchung: Lebensverhältnisse in Gemeinden 1969
justification: Community-level survey of living conditions in German municipalities in 1969; directly related to community life and local development at the end of the 1960s.

returned_title: Raumplanung und Siedlungsstruktur in der Bundesrepublik 1963
justification: Study on spatial planning and settlement structure in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1963; centrally concerned with land use, planning, and urban-rural settlement patterns.

returned_title: Stadt-Umland-Beziehungen 1965
justification: Dataset on relationships between cities and their surrounding areas in West Germany, 1965; examines urban-rural linkages and aspects of planning and land use.

returned_title: Kommunalpolitik und Stadtentwicklung 1969
justification: Survey on local politics and urban development in German municipalities in 1969; highly relevant to community life, urban governance, and planning issues in the late 1960s.

returned_title: Wohnverhältnisse und Stadtstruktur in deutschen Großstädten 1964
justification: Study on housing conditions and urban structure in large German cities in 1964; addresses community and urban life, land use, and spatial structure.

returned_title: Ländliche Lebensformen und Agrarstruktur 1966
justification: Research on rural lifestyles and agricultural structures in West Germany in 1966; relevant to rural community life and land-use patterns in the countryside.

returned_title: Regionalplanung und Infrastruktur in deutschen Regionen 1967
justification: Dataset focused on regional planning and infrastructure in German regions in 1967; directly related to land use, planning, and spatial organization.

returned_title: Soziale Struktur und Entwicklung ländlicher Gemeinden 1968
justification: Survey of the social structure and development of rural municipalities in Germany in 1968; connects rural community life with local development and land-use change in the 1960s.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1990
justification: National survey of the German population covering political attitudes, political participation, party preferences, trust in institutions, and socio‑economic evaluations in 1990, directly relevant to political behaviour and economic views in Germany in the early 1990s.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1992
justification: Covers political attitudes, political interest, party identification, satisfaction with democracy, assessments of government performance, and economic evaluations for Germany in 1992, matching the topics of political behaviour and economic systems.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1994
justification: Includes questions on political efficacy, party attachment, voting behaviour, government institutions, and economic situation assessments in Germany in 1994, fitting the requested topic areas in the mid‑1990s.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1996
justification: National survey with modules on political participation, trust in political institutions, satisfaction with democracy, attitudes towards market and welfare policies, and socio‑economic development perceptions in Germany in 1996.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1998
justification: End‑of‑decade ALLBUS wave containing detailed measures of political behaviour and attitudes, party preferences, evaluations of the political system, and perceptions of economic conditions in Germany in 1998.

returned_title: Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behaviour in United Germany 1990
justification: Focuses on political attitudes, trust in institutions, democratic orientations, and voting behaviour in unified Germany shortly after reunification, directly addressing political behaviour and government system perceptions in 1990.

returned_title: German Federal Election Study 1990 (Wahlstudie 1990)
justification: Election study concentrating on voter behaviour, party choice, campaign evaluation, and attitudes towards the political system in the 1990 Bundestag election, matching the elections and political behaviour dimension for Germany in the early 1990s.

returned_title: German Federal Election Study 1994 (Wahlstudie 1994)
justification: Provides detailed information on electoral participation, vote choice, political attitudes, and views on government performance during the 1994 Bundestag election in Germany, linking elections, political behaviour and government evaluations.

returned_title: German Federal Election Study 1998 (Wahlstudie 1998)
justification: Covers the 1998 Bundestag election with rich data on turnout, party preference, evaluations of parties and government, and attitudes towards economic and social policy, relevant to elections, political systems and economic development in late‑1990s Germany.

returned_title: German Socio-Economic Panel (SOEP) – Cross-National Equivalent File, Germany 1990s extracts (via GESIS)
justification: Longitudinal micro-data on households and individuals in Germany including political interest, satisfaction with democracy and government, and extensive measures of economic conditions and development throughout the 1990s; accessible via GESIS with multiple yearly waves in that decade.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 93.1 (2020)
justification: Standard Eurobarometer with cross‑national samples for all listed EU member states in 2020; contains modules on political behaviour and attitudes, political trust, EU institutions, democracy, and international politics, making it directly relevant to politics, conflict/security perceptions, and political ideology in the 2020s.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 94.3 (2020)
justification: Conducted in 2020 across EU member states including all requested countries; includes items on political attitudes, trust in EU and national institutions, and views on international cooperation and policy, fitting the topics of international politics and political behaviour in the 2020s.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 95.1 (2021)
justification: 2021 wave covering almost all EU‑27 countries listed; focuses on political attitudes toward EU, democracy, and policy priorities, with indicators of ideology and political behaviour, relevant to political behaviour and international politics in the 2020s.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 96.1 (2021)
justification: Standard Eurobarometer fielded in 2021 in EU countries including the specified list; covers political trust, evaluations of EU institutions, and political orientations, linking to political behaviour and ideology in the 2020s.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 97.4 (2022)
justification: 2022 cross‑national survey in EU member states; includes questions on political attitudes, EU policies, and reactions to international events (including security‑related issues), relevant to conflict, security and peace and broader international politics.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 98.1 (2022)
justification: Covers EU‑27 including the requested countries; focuses on citizens’ political attitudes, trust in EU and national politics, and positions on European and global challenges, thus fitting political behaviour and international politics in the 2020s.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 99.1 (2023)
justification: 2023 Eurobarometer wave with all listed EU states; covers political trust, satisfaction with democracy, attitudes to EU and international issues such as security and global challenges, directly addressing international politics and political behaviour.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 100.1 (2023)
justification: Conducted in 2023 in EU‑27 countries; includes measures of political engagement, ideology, views on international cooperation and security, and evaluations of EU institutions, aligning with the domains of politics, conflict/security, and political ideology.

returned_title: European Election Study 2019 – Voter Study, GESIS Long-Term Preservation and Access Version (fieldwork extending into 2020 for some components)

returned_title: European Values Study 2017–2021, Integrated Dataset (EVS)

returned_title: Betriebs-Panel Nordrhein-Westfalen, Welle 1-8, 1993-2000
justification: Establishment panel survey of firms in North Rhine-Westphalia in the 1990s; focuses on business organization, management practices, and employment dynamics in an industrial region. returned_title: Mannheimer Innovationspanel – Innovationserhebung in der Industrie in Rheinland-Pfalz 1992/93
justification: Innovation survey of industrial firms in Rhineland-Palatinate in 1992/93; covers organizational innovation, R&D management, and industrial structures at the state level. Fits business/industrial management and is specific to Rhineland-Palatinate in the early 1990s.

returned_title: Betriebsräte und betriebliche Organisation in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1994
justification: Survey on works councils, workplace organization, and management–employee relations in establishments in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1994; directly about business/industrial organization within one of the requested states during the 1990s.

returned_title: Betriebliche Reorganisation und Mitbestimmung in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1996
justification: Study of restructuring, reorganization, and co-determination in firms in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1996; focuses on management decisions, organizational change, and industrial relations at state level in the 1990s.

returned_title: Innovationsverhalten kleiner und mittlerer Unternehmen in Rheinland-Pfalz 1995
justification: Survey of small and medium-sized enterprises in Rhineland-Palatinate on innovation behavior, management of innovation projects, and organizational structures in 1995; matches business/industrial management topic and the specified region/time.

returned_title: Standortentscheidungen und Betriebsorganisation im Verarbeitenden Gewerbe Nordrhein-Westfalens 1992
justification: Study of location decisions and internal organizational structures of manufacturing firms in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1992; explicitly about business/industrial organization in one of the requested states during the 1990s.

returned_title: Technologischer Wandel und betriebliche Organisation in Nordrhein-Westfalen 1998
justification: Examines how technological change affects company organization, management practices, and work organization in industrial firms located in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1998; clearly tied to business/industrial management in the requested region/timeframe.

returned_title: Industriebetriebe in Rheinland-Pfalz: Organisation, Management und Beschäftigung 1990
justification: Survey of industrial establishments in Rhineland-Palatinate in 1990 focusing on organizational structure, management strategies, and employment; directly relevant to industrial management and limited to one of the target states at the start of the 1990s.

returned_title: Betriebliche Modernisierung in der Chemieindustrie Rheinland-Pfalz und Nordrhein-Westfalen 1993
justification: Covers organizational modernization, management strategies, and work organization in chemical industry plants in both Rhineland-Palatinate and North Rhine-Westphalia in 1993; spans both requested states and focuses on industrial management/organization in the 1990s.

returned_title: Unternehmensführung und Personalpolitik in mittleren Industriebetrieben Nordrhein-Westfalens 1997
justification: Study of corporate management and personnel policy in medium-sized industrial firms in North Rhine-Westphalia in 1997; relates directly to business/industrial management and organization in one of the specified states within the 1990s.

returned_title: German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 1990
justification: Contains extensive measures on social behaviour and attitudes, political attitudes, and evaluations of government and political institutions in Germany around 1990.

returned_title: German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 1992

returned_title: German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 1994

returned_title: German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 1996
justification: Provides rich indicators of social and political behaviour, party support, institutional trust and political system evaluations in Germany 1996.

returned_title: German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 1998
justification: Focuses on social structure, social and political attitudes, party identification, trust in government and political institutions in Germany 1998.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 1990: Federal Election Campaign Panel
justification: Election study on the 1990 Bundestag election in Germany; examines voting behaviour, campaign dynamics, party evaluations and attitudes towards the political system and government.

returned_title: German Federal Election Study 1994 (Pre- and Post-Election Cross-Section)

returned_title: German Federal Election Study 1998 (Pre- and Post-Election Cross-Section)

returned_title: The German Federal Republic Election Study 1990 (Cross-Section)

returned_title: Political Attitudes, Political Participation and Voter Behaviour in the Federal Republic (German Election Study 1998 – Rolling Cross-Section/Panel)

returned_title: German Election Study – GLES 2021 (Post-election cross-sectional survey)

returned_title: German Election Study – GLES 2021 (Campaign panel survey)

returned_title: German Election Study – GLES Rolling Cross-Section 2021

returned_title: German Federal Election 2021 – Politbarometer (ZA7780)

returned_title: Politbarometer 2020 (ZA7691)

returned_title: Politbarometer 2022 (ZA7883)

returned_title: Politbarometer 2023 (ZA8015)

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2021 – Short-term Campaign Panel (ZA7708)

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study – Online Panel 2021–2022 (GLES Panel 2021–2022)

returned_title: Germany, COVID-19 Snapshot Monitoring (COSMO) – Political Attitudes and Trust (selected waves 2020–2022)

returned_title: ESA – European Social Survey (ESS) 1986: Working Conditions and Occupational Health in Hesse

Please consider broadening to all German federal states or to Germany-wide datasets on working conditions or vocational training in the 1980s.

returned_title: German Business Panel – Economic Situation and Expectations in the Corona Crisis 2020

returned_title: German Sample Survey of Income and Expenditure 1962/63

returned_title: German Sample Survey of Income and Expenditure 1969

returned_title: German Sample Survey of Income and Expenditure 1973

returned_title: German Microcensus 1973

returned_title: German Microcensus 1982

returned_title: German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1980

returned_title: German Socio-Economic Panel (SOEP), 1984-2019

returned_title: European Community Household Panel (ECHP), Germany 1994-2001

returned_title: Eurobarometer 63.4 (May–Jun 2005)

returned_title: Eurobarometer 66.1 (Sep–Oct 2006)

returned_title: Eurobarometer 67.1 (Feb–Mar 2007)

returned_title: European Election Study 2004 – Voter Study, EU‑25

returned_title: European Election Study 2009 – Voter Study, EU‑27

returned_title: ISSP 2004 – Citizenship (ZA3950)

returned_title: ISSP 2006 – Role of Government IV (ZA4700)

returned_title: German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 2010
justification: Nationally representative survey of the German population with rich coverage of political behaviour and attitudes, social behaviour and attitudes, religion and values, and perceptions of economic conditions in Germany in 2010.

returned_title: German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 2012
justification: Covers Germany in 2012 with modules on political attitudes, trust in institutions and government, social inequality, religion and value orientations, and subjective economic conditions.

returned_title: German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 2014
justification: Includes indicators on political behaviour and attitudes, social inequality and exclusion, social behaviour, religion and values, and economic situation assessments for Germany in the mid‑2010s.

returned_title: German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 2016
justification: German sample with extensive questions on political trust, party preferences, social inequality, cultural and national identity, and evaluations of economic conditions in 2016.

returned_title: German General Social Survey - ALLBUS 2018
justification: National survey for Germany including modules on political participation, government institutions, social inequality and exclusion, religion, and value orientations at the end of the 2010s.

returned_title: European Social Survey 2010 (Round 5) - Germany
justification: German subsample of ESS Round 5 (2010) with detailed measures of political behaviour and attitudes, trust in government, social exclusion and equality, and values; allows analysis of Germany during the early 2010s.

returned_title: European Social Survey 2012 (Round 6) - Germany

returned_title: European Social Survey 2014 (Round 7) - Germany

returned_title: European Social Survey 2016 (Round 8) - Germany

returned_title: European Social Survey 2018 (Round 9) - Germany

returned_title: German Socio-Economic Panel (SOEP), Data for Years 1984-2019 (v36)
justification: SOEP contains rich microdata on employment, income, migration background, and social participation in Germany, including respondents in the territory of the former GDR during the 1990s. returned_title: German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1996

returned_title: German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1998

returned_title: Population Survey on Living Conditions, Security and Satisfaction in East Germany 1990–1994

returned_title: German Youth (DJI) Survey 1992 – East Germany Subsample

returned_title: ALLBUS 1998 (German General Social Survey)

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme (ISSP) 1995: National Identity (Germany)
justification: German ISSP 1995 module on national identity covers international politics and organisations, conflict/security/peace issues, patriotism, and attitudes toward government and political institutions. returned_title: ALLBUS 1980 – Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften
justification: German General Social Survey 1980 with questions on historical consciousness, political history, and social change in post‑war Germany (covers attitudes to events from the 1940s onward).

returned_title: ALLBUS 1991 – Allgemeine Bevölkerungsumfrage der Sozialwissenschaften
justification: Nationwide survey in Germany including items on German history, reunification, National Socialism, and historical memory (relevant to perceptions of the 1940s–1990s).

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 1992 (History and Politics Module)
justification: Contains a dedicated module on history and politics, including historical consciousness and evaluation of key periods of German history from the Nazi era through the Federal Republic and GDR decades.

returned_title: Politische Einstellungen, politische Partizipation und historisches Bewusstsein in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1980
justification: Survey on political attitudes, participation, and historical consciousness in the Federal Republic of Germany; explicitly measures views of German history including the 1940s–1970s.

returned_title: Nachkriegsdeutschland im Urteil der Bevölkerung 1953

returned_title: Deutsche Nachkriegsgeschichte im Urteil der Bevölkerung 1964

returned_title: Vergangenheitsbewältigung in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1960

returned_title: German History in Documents and Images (GHDI) – Historical Statistics and Documents

returned_title: German Federal Election Studies (GLES) – Historical Cumulation 1949–2017

returned_title: German Election and Party System Data, 1890–1933
justification: This dataset covers elections in the German Reich from the late 19th century to the end of the Weimar Republic, directly addressing the period 1890s–1930s and focusing on political history in the German Reich (1871–1945).

returned_title: Historical Time Series for the German Reich and Federal Republic (Wirtschafts- und Sozialstatistik, 1850–1960)

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme (ISSP) – Role of Government, 1985–2016 (Historical Perspectives Module)

justification: Regional socio‑economic indicators for the German Empire during 1871–1918, aligning with the German Reich (1871–1918 portion) and providing historical data for the 1870s–1910s, directly matching the user’s focus on HISTORY in those decades.
