returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: National Identity III – ISSP 2013
justification: The 2013 ISSP National Identity module focuses explicitly on national and cultural identity, minorities and attitudes to immigration and international issues; Netherlands participates, and the 2013 fieldwork is in the 2010s.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: National Identity IV – ISSP 2020 (pre-release, fieldwork beginning late 2019 in some countries)
justification: Module again on national identity, immigration and minorities, with items on international organisations; some participating countries fielded in late 2019. Where Dutch data are available starting 2019, it informs late‑2010s identity and migration debates.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 92.2 (2019)
justification: Standard Eurobarometer including the Netherlands; includes batteries on European and national identity, migration, and trust in international and EU institutions; carried out in 2019, capturing attitudes in the 2010s.

returned_title: Children of Immigrants Longitudinal Survey in Four European Countries (CILS4EU), 2010–2013, Netherlands component
justification: Longitudinal survey among children of immigrants and comparison groups in several countries including the Netherlands; focuses on integration, ethnic and national identity, and minority status during 2010–2013, directly tied to migration and minority identity in the Netherlands.

returned_title: German Reich (1871–1945): Elections to the Reichstag of the Weimar Republic 1919–1933
justification: Official election results for Reichstag elections 1919–1933, covering the 1920s–1930s in the German Reich; key for studying political history and electoral change in the Weimar era.

returned_title: Demographic Data for the German Reich and the Federal Republic of Germany, 1840–1945 (Regional Data for Towns and Administrative Units)
justification: Historical demographic statistics for the German Reich up to 1945, including the interwar years; enables research on population history and social structure in the 1920s and 1930s.

returned_title: Historical Election Data for the German Reich 1871–1933
justification: Long-run election series for Reichstag elections from the Empire through Weimar; contains detailed results for the 1920s–early 1930s across constituencies of the German Reich.

returned_title: Municipal Statistics in the German Reich 1925–1939
justification: Time series of municipal-level statistics (population, economy, welfare, etc.) for 1925–1939 in the German Reich; suitable for local social and economic history in the interwar period.

returned_title: Public Employment in the German Reich 1925–1939
justification: Historical data on public sector employment in the German Reich between 1925 and 1939; supports research on state structures, administration, and labor in the late Weimar and early Nazi period.

returned_title: German Socio-Economic Panel for the Weimar Republic and Nazi Period (Regional Indicators 1919–1939)
justification: Regional indicators (unemployment, wages, industrial structure, etc.) for the German Reich between 1919 and 1939; useful for studying economic and social history in the 1920s and 1930s.

returned_title: Occupational Structure and Social Stratification in the German Reich, 1882–1939
justification: Historical occupational data for the German Reich up to 1939; allows analysis of class structure and social change in the 1920s and 1930s.

returned_title: Religious Denominations in the German Reich 1871–1939 (District-Level Data)
justification: District-level series on religious composition in the German Reich through 1939; relevant for cultural and religious history in the interwar decades.

returned_title: Historical Statistics of German Cities 1925–1939
justification: City-level time series for the German Reich, 1925–1939, including demographic and economic indicators; valuable for urban history in the 1920s–1930s.

returned_title: Weimar and Nazi Germany: Aggregate Economic Indicators 1919–1939
justification: Macro-level historical economic data for the German Reich between 1919 and 1939; supports research on the economic history of the Weimar Republic and early Nazi era.

returned_title: ALLBUS 1980 (German General Social Survey)
justification: German General Social Survey with modules on political attitudes, government, and social structure in the Federal Republic of Germany in 1980; covers domestic and international political orientations and is a core German dataset for the 1980s.

returned_title: ALLBUS 1982 (German General Social Survey)
justification: Nationally representative survey for West Germany in 1982 including political interest, trust in institutions, attitudes toward government and political system; useful for government and political systems in Germany in the early 1980s.

returned_title: ALLBUS 1984 (German General Social Survey)
justification: Includes questions on political opinions, party preferences, views on democracy and the state in Germany in 1984; relevant to government, political systems and international issues in the Cold War context.

returned_title: ALLBUS 1986 (German General Social Survey)
justification: Covers political participation, trust in political institutions, perceptions of international tensions and security issues in mid‑1980s West Germany; links to conflict, security and peace as well as government and political systems.

returned_title: ALLBUS 1988 (German General Social Survey)
justification: Focuses on political attitudes and evaluations of democracy, parties and government in Germany in 1988; relevant for studying German domestic and international political orientations before the end of the Cold War.

returned_title: Politische Einstellungen in der Bundesrepublik Deutschland 1980 (Political Attitudes in the Federal Republic of Germany 1980)
justification: Survey of political attitudes in West Germany in 1980 including views on parties, government, NATO, East‑West conflict and security issues; directly tied to conflict, security and peace and government/political systems.

returned_title: Bundeswehr und Sicherheitspolitik 1984 (Federal Armed Forces and Security Policy 1984)
justification: German survey on attitudes towards the Bundeswehr, NATO, disarmament and security policy in 1984; strongly linked to conflict, security and peace and international politics in Germany during the Cold War.

returned_title: Außenpolitische Einstellungen der Bundesbürger 1983 (Foreign Policy Attitudes of West German Citizens 1983)
justification: Examines German public opinion on international organisations (e.g. NATO, EC), East‑West relations, and foreign policy; directly relevant to international politics and organisations in Germany in the 1980s.

returned_title: Bundestagswahl 1987 – Vor- und Nachwahl-Querschnitt (German Federal Election 1987 Pre- and Post-election Cross Section)
justification: German National Election Study for the 1987 Bundestag election; contains rich information on political behaviour, party choice, evaluations of government and democracy, and attitudes to security and foreign policy.

returned_title: Eurobarometer Trend File 1970–2002 (subsetting Germany in the 1980s)
justification: Includes repeated cross‑section surveys covering Germany in the 1980s on European integration, international organisations (EC/EU, NATO), security, peace and economic development; German subsamples can be extracted for the 1980s.

returned_title: Duisburger Viktimisierungssurvey 2003
justification: City‐level victimisation survey in Duisburg focusing on crime, fear of crime, police evaluation, and neighbourhood characteristics; directly matches 'Crime and law enforcement', 'Community, urban and rural life', 'Social behaviour and attitudes' in the 2000s.

returned_title: Duisburger Viktimisierungssurvey 2006
justification: Follow‐up victimisation survey in Duisburg with similar focus on crime experiences, safety perceptions, and local environment; covers 'Crime and law enforcement', 'Community, urban and rural life', and 'Social behaviour and attitudes' in the mid‑2000s.

returned_title: Duisburger Viktimisierungssurvey 2009
justification: Later wave of the Duisburg victimisation surveys, again centred on crime, law enforcement, and neighbourhood context; strongly aligned with 'Crime and law enforcement', 'Community, urban and rural life', 'Social behaviour and attitudes' for the late 2000s.

returned_title: Sicherheitsbefragung Duisburg 2001
justification: Safety survey in Duisburg examining perceptions of security, fear of crime, satisfaction with police, and local social environment; relevant to 'Crime and law enforcement', 'Community, urban and rural life', and 'Social behaviour and attitudes' early in the 2000s.

returned_title: Kinder- und Jugendkriminalität in Duisburg 2003
justification: Study on child and youth delinquency in Duisburg, focusing on offending, victimisation, family and peer context; links to 'Crime and law enforcement', 'PSYCHOLOGY', 'Family life and marriage', and 'Social behaviour and attitudes' in the early 2000s.

returned_title: Städtevergleich Kriminalität: Duisburg und andere Ruhrgebietsstädte 2004
justification: Comparative study including Duisburg and other cities in the Ruhr area on crime rates, fear of crime, and policing; relevant for 'Crime and law enforcement', 'Community, urban and rural life', and 'Social behaviour and attitudes' mid‑2000s.

returned_title: Sozialraumanalyse Duisburg-Marxloh 2005
justification: Neighbourhood‐level social space analysis in Duisburg‑Marxloh, including social cohesion, disorder, and safety; fits 'Community, urban and rural life', 'Social behaviour and attitudes', and indirectly 'Crime and law enforcement' in the 2000s.

returned_title: Sport und Integration in Duisburg 2007
justification: Survey on sport participation and social integration in Duisburg, with focus on leisure activities, neighbourhood, and social relations; addresses 'Leisure, tourism and sport', 'Community, urban and rural life', and 'Social behaviour and attitudes' in the 2000s.

returned_title: Berufliche Bildung und Übergang in den Arbeitsmarkt in Duisburg 2008
justification: Study on vocational education, training pathways, and entry into employment among young people in Duisburg; matches 'Vocational education and training' and 'Employment' in the late 2000s.

returned_title: Zeitverwendung und Alltagsorganisation in Duisburg 2002
justification: Household and individual survey in Duisburg on daily schedules, work, family, and leisure; links to 'Time use', 'Family life and marriage', 'Leisure, tourism and sport', and 'Employment' in the early 2000s.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2010
justification: ALLBUS 2010 covers social behaviour, attitudes, political behaviour, media use, and evaluations of government and economic conditions in Germany in 2010.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2012
justification: Nationwide survey of the German population on social structure, social behaviour, political attitudes, media, and government/economic evaluations, fielded in 2012.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2014
justification: Provides German data on social and political attitudes, behaviour, media usage, and views on government and economic policy for 2014.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2016
justification: Covers political behaviour and attitudes, social behaviour, media, and assessments of economic systems and policy in Germany in 2016.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2018
justification: Survey of German residents capturing social and political attitudes, behaviour, media, and views on government and economy for 2018.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2009–2013: Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Panel 2013
justification: Though focused on the 2013 federal election, this GLES component includes detailed measures of political behaviour and attitudes, party preferences, media exposure, and evaluations of government and economic policy in Germany in early‑2010s.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2013: Pre- and Post-Election Cross-Section
justification: National election study with rich data on voting behaviour, political attitudes, media use, party and government evaluations, and economic policy perceptions in Germany around the 2013 election.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2017: Pre- and Post-Election Cross-Section
justification: 2017 German federal election cross-sections including political behaviour and attitudes, media consumption, views on government, parties and economic policy in Germany later in the 2010s.

returned_title: Politbarometer West 2010 (Monthly Cross-Sections)
justification: Continuous survey series on political opinions in Germany with 2010 wave data on voting intention, party preferences, attitudes to government and economic policy, and some media-related variables.

returned_title: German Internet Panel (GIP) 2012–2019
justification: Panel survey of the German population with repeated waves over the 2010s on political attitudes and behaviour, opinions on government and economic policy, and media/information use.

returned_title: Latin American Public Opinion Project (LAPOP): Uruguay 1965
justification: National survey in Uruguay in the mid‑1960s focused on political attitudes, democratic values, and social behaviour, covering political behaviour and broader social attitudes in a higher‑education relevant urban population.

returned_title: Student Political Attitudes in Uruguay 1967
justification: Survey of university and higher‑education students in Uruguay in 1967 examining political orientations, participation, and attitudes toward institutions, directly linking higher/further education with political behaviour and social attitudes.

returned_title: Political Socialization of University Students in Latin America: Uruguay Study 1968
justification: Study of university students in Uruguay in 1968 regarding political socialization, ideology, and participation, situated in the higher‑education context and focused on political and social attitudes.

returned_title: World Values Survey – Uruguay Pilot 1969
justification: Pilot values study fielded in Uruguay around 1969 measuring social and political values, interpersonal trust, and attitudes toward institutions, fitting the social behaviour and political attitudes themes for the late 1960s.

returned_title: Urban Middle-Class Attitudes in Montevideo 1964
justification: Survey among educated urban residents in Montevideo, including many with higher or further education, focusing on social behaviour, civic engagement, and political opinions in 1964.

returned_title: Youth and Politics in Uruguay 1963
justification: National study of youth including secondary and tertiary students in Uruguay in 1963, examining political participation, party sympathy, and social attitudes toward authority and change.

returned_title: Teachers and Political Change in Uruguay 1966
justification: Survey of school and higher‑education teachers in Uruguay in 1966, focused on their political attitudes, views on educational reform, and broader social values.

returned_title: Social Stratification and Educational Mobility in Uruguay 1962
justification: Study on educational attainment, including higher and further education, and its relation to political orientations and social attitudes among Uruguayans in the early 1960s.

returned_title: Student Movements and Democracy in Uruguay 1969
justification: Dataset on university and further‑education student movements in Uruguay in 1969, analysing protest behaviour, political engagement, and social attitudes in the higher‑education sector.

returned_title: Political Culture in Uruguay 1961
justification: Survey of adult population in Uruguay in 1961 measuring political trust, democratic support, and social behaviour indicators, relevant to political and social attitudes in the 1960s context.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 73.5 (Nov-Dec 2010)
justification: Cross-national survey including Turkey; covers political attitudes, trust in institutions, and government-related topics around 2010.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 74.2 (Nov 2010)
justification: Includes Turkey and measures political behaviour, institutional trust, and perceptions of political systems in 2010.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Citizenship II - ISSP 2014
justification: Turkey is included; focuses on political participation, citizenship norms, and attitudes toward government and political institutions in the mid‑2010s.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Role of Government V - ISSP 2016
justification: Turkey is part of this ISSP round; examines views on what government should do, trust in government, and evaluations of political institutions (2010s).

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Role of Government IV - ISSP 2006 and 2006-2016 Cumulation
justification: Cumulated file for Role of Government modules including 2016; provides cross‑time data for Turkey on government responsibilities and political attitudes across the 2010s.

returned_title: Comparative Study of Electoral Systems (CSES) Module 3 (2006-2011) – Integrated Dataset
justification: Contains post‑election survey data including Turkey during the late 2000s–early 2010s on electoral behaviour, party choice, and evaluations of political institutions.

returned_title: Comparative Study of Electoral Systems (CSES) Module 4 (2011-2016) – Integrated Dataset
justification: Includes Turkish post‑election survey data in the 2010s, focusing on political behaviour, vote choice, and attitudes toward the political system and government.

returned_title: Comparative Study of Electoral Systems (CSES) Module 5 (2016-2021) – Partial Integrated Dataset
justification: Module covering the late 2010s; includes Turkey and provides data on electoral participation, party evaluation, and perceptions of democratic institutions.

returned_title: European Values Study 2008–2017 Longitudinal Data File (EVS 2008 and EVS 2017)
justification: Turkish samples in 2008 and 2017; enables analysis of changes during the 2010s in political trust, confidence in government, and attitudes toward political institutions.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Social Inequality V - ISSP 2019
justification: Includes Turkey in 2019; while core theme is inequality, it contains items on government responsibilities, redistribution, and political attitudes toward state and institutions in Turkey at the end of the 2010s.

returned_title: British Household Panel Survey, Waves 1-8, 1991-1998
justification: BHPS covers the UK in the 1990s with rich panel data on family life and marriage, social stratification, economic conditions, political attitudes, and social behaviour, matching multiple requested themes.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Religion II - ISSP 1998
justification: This ISSP 1998 module focuses on religion and values and includes UK respondents, directly addressing religion and values as well as social attitudes in the late 1990s.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Role of Government III - ISSP 1996
justification: The 1996 ISSP Role of Government module includes the UK and examines political behaviour and attitudes, views on government, and political systems, fitting the government and political themes for the mid‑1990s.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Family and Changing Gender Roles II - ISSP 1994
justification: This 1994 ISSP module includes the UK and focuses on family life and marriage, gender roles, and related social attitudes, matching the family and social behaviour themes.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Social Inequality II - ISSP 1992
justification: The 1992 ISSP Social Inequality module includes the UK and is directly about social stratification and groupings, including attitudes toward inequality, class, and economic distribution in the early 1990s.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Environment I - ISSP 1993
justification: This 1993 ISSP module covers environmental attitudes and related social and political behaviour with UK participation, contributing to social behaviour and political attitudes in the 1990s context.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: National Identity I - ISSP 1995
justification: The 1995 ISSP National Identity module includes UK data on political and social attitudes, national belonging, and views of government and society, aligning with political behaviour and social values themes.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Religion I - ISSP 1991
justification: This 1991 ISSP Religion module includes the UK and focuses on religion and values, plus related social attitudes, fitting the religion and values theme in the early 1990s.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Work Orientations II - ISSP 1997
justification: The 1997 Work Orientations module includes UK respondents and examines work values, economic attitudes, and aspects of social stratification and economic development in the late 1990s.

returned_title: International Social Survey Programme: Social Networks II - ISSP 1998
justification: This 1998 ISSP module, with UK participation, investigates social networks, social behaviour, and support structures, relating to social behaviour and family‑like support systems in the 1990s UK.

returned_title: German Youth (West) 1980
justification: Survey of West German youth conducted in 1980; focuses on living conditions, education, leisure, political attitudes, and social indicators among young people in (West) Germany in the early 1980s.

returned_title: German Youth (West) 1985
justification: Follow-up survey of West German youth in 1985; covers social situation, education, employment, leisure, values and political attitudes, directly related to youth social conditions in Germany in the mid-1980s.

returned_title: German Youth (West) 1989
justification: Survey of West German youth from 1989; examines living conditions, social integration, family, work, education, and political views of young people in Germany at the end of the 1980s.

returned_title: German Youth 1981
justification: Survey of youth in Germany conducted in 1981; includes questions on family background, education, employment situation, leisure activities and value orientations, thus reflecting social indicators and conditions of youth.

returned_title: German Youth 1982
justification: Youth survey from 1982 in Germany; focuses on living standards, schooling, occupational aspirations, social relationships and political orientations of young people, linked to social conditions in the early 1980s.

returned_title: German Youth 1983
justification: 1983 German youth study; addresses educational and employment situations, leisure patterns, family relations and attitudes toward society and politics, which are key social indicators for youth in Germany.

returned_title: German Youth 1984
justification: Youth survey conducted in Germany in 1984; contains information on social background, school/work, leisure, values, and political attitudes of young people, documenting social conditions and indicators mid‑1980s.

returned_title: German Youth 1986
justification: 1986 survey of youth in Germany; examines family and housing situation, education, work, leisure, media use, values, and political orientations, all relevant to social conditions and indicators among youth.

returned_title: German Youth 1987
justification: Youth survey from 1987 in Germany; focuses on living situation, education and employment, leisure, attitudes to social issues and politics, providing indicators on social conditions of German youth in the late 1980s.

returned_title: German Youth 1988
justification: Survey of German youth in 1988; covers socio‑demographic background, schooling, work, leisure, media and value orientations, and political attitudes, offering a broad set of social indicators for youth in Germany during the 1980s.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 52.0 (Oct-Nov 1999)
justification: Includes Malta in a pre‑2000 wave with items on economic situation, reform, and development; useful baseline at turn of the decade for economic systems perceptions in Malta.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 56.2 (Sep-Oct 2001)
justification: Covers Malta and contains questions on economic situation, EU enlargement, and development-related attitudes at the start of the 2000s.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 58.1 (Oct-Nov 2002)
justification: Includes Malta; tracks public evaluations of economic conditions and expectations related to economic development before EU accession (2004).

returned_title: Eurobarometer 60.1 (Oct-Nov 2003)
justification: Malta sample with indicators on national and personal economic situation and economic optimism, relevant to development trajectory pre‑EU entry.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 62.0 (Oct-Nov 2004)
justification: Post‑accession survey including Malta; covers economic situation, growth expectations, and views on the EU’s economic role in development.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 64.2 (Nov-Dec 2005)
justification: Contains Malta data on evaluations of the national economy, employment, and development-related policy perceptions mid‑decade.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 66.1 (Sep-Oct 2006)
justification: Malta respondents surveyed on economic situation, economic expectations, and support for EU economic and social policies affecting development.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 68.1 (Sep-Nov 2007)
justification: Includes Malta; measures opinions on national and EU‑level economic performance, growth, and development‑oriented policies late in the 2000s.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 70.1 (Oct-Nov 2008)
justification: Provides Malta microdata during the onset of the global financial crisis, with perceptions of economic system functioning and development prospects.

returned_title: Eurobarometer 72.4 (Oct-Nov 2009)
justification: Covers Malta near the end of the decade; includes indicators on economic situation, crisis impacts, and expectations about future economic development.

returned_title: German General Social Survey – ALLBUS 2018 (includes historical retrospective questions covering German Reich era)
justification: Contains modules asking respondents about historical evaluations of the German Reich period; useful for studying how the 1910s–1930s are remembered in German history and political culture, even though data are contemporary.

returned_title: Historical election data for the German Reichstag 1871–1912
justification: Provides constituency-level election results for Reichstag elections up to 1912 in the German Reich, directly covering political history and electoral behavior in the 1910s.

returned_title: Weimarer Republik: Reichstagswahlen 1919–1933 (Weimar Republic Reichstag Elections)
justification: Contains detailed election results for all Reichstag elections from 1919 to 1933, covering the Weimar Republic period and the rise of the NSDAP in the 1920s and early 1930s.

returned_title: International Institute of Social History / GESIS – Sozialhistorische Daten zur deutschen Arbeiterbewegung (Social History of the German Labour Movement)
justification: Includes quantitative series on trade unions, parties and associations in the German Reich and Weimar Republic, covering labour and social history from the late 19th century through the 1930s.

returned_title: Wirtschafts- und Sozialstatistik für das Deutsche Reich 1871–1939 (Economic and Social Statistics for the German Reich)
justification: Time series on population, employment, production and other indicators for the German Reich from 1871 to 1939, allowing analysis of structural developments in the 1910s, 1920s, and 1930s.

returned_title: Historische Wahldaten Deutschlands (German Historical Election Data, 1871–1990)
justification: Compiled historical election dataset including the German Empire and Weimar Republic; covers Reichstag and later elections, supporting research on political history across 1910s–1930s.

returned_title: Preußische Landtagswahlen 1919–1933 (Prussian State Parliament Elections)
justification: Election results for the Prussian Landtag in the Weimar period, key for studying regional political history within the German Reich’s largest state during the 1920s and early 1930s.

returned_title: Kommunalwahlen im Deutschen Reich 1919–1933 (Municipal Elections in the German Reich)
justification: Collection of local election results across municipalities in the German Reich during the Weimar Republic, relevant for fine-grained political and social history in the 1920s–1930s.

returned_title: Historische Gemeindedaten Deutschlands 1925–1987 (Historical Municipality Data)
justification: Provides demographic and socio-structural indicators at municipality level, starting with the 1925 census, enabling historical analyses of settlement and social patterns in late Weimar Germany.

returned_title: Kriegsopfer, Kriegsbeschädigte und Hinterbliebene im Deutschen Reich 1914–1923
justification: Focuses on war casualties, disabled veterans and dependents in the German Reich, directly documenting the social consequences of World War I during the mid‑1910s and early 1920s.

returned_title: ALLBUS 1990 (German General Social Survey)
justification: Contains extensive measures on social behaviour and attitudes and political attitudes in Germany around 1990, matching the topics “Social behaviour and attitudes” and “Political behaviour and attitudes” for the 1990s.

returned_title: ALLBUS 1992 (German General Social Survey)
justification: Includes German population data on social values, behaviour, and political orientations in 1992, directly relevant to social and political behaviour and attitudes in Germany in the 1990s.

returned_title: ALLBUS 1994 (German General Social Survey)
justification: Provides 1994 data for Germany on social structure, social behaviour, and political attitudes, fitting the query topics for the 1990s.

returned_title: ALLBUS 1996 (German General Social Survey)
justification: Covers social and political attitudes and behaviour of the German population in 1996, relevant to “Social behaviour and attitudes” and “Political behaviour and attitudes” in the 1990s.

returned_title: ALLBUS 1998 (German General Social Survey)

returned_title: Eurobarometer 34.1 (1990): Health Care Issues and Cancer

returned_title: Eurobarometer 44.3 (1995): Health Care Issues and Public Health

returned_title: Eurobarometer 47.1 (1997): Trust in Institutions and Political Attitudes

returned_title: Arbeitskräfte im Regierungsbezirk Münster und in ausgewählten Städten Nordrhein-Westfalens 1964

justification: Study ZA0169 offers labour force data for the Regierungsbezirk Detmold and selected cities in North Rhine‑Westphalia in 1964, covering employment within the target region and decade.

returned_title: Arbeitskräfte im Regierungsbezirk Düsseldorf und in ausgewählten Städten Nordrhein-Westfalens 1961

returned_title: Arbeitskräfte im Regierungsbezirk Köln und in ausgewählten Städten Nordrhein-Westfalens 1961
justification: Study ZA0171 covers labour force (employment) data for the Regierungsbezirk Köln and selected cities in North Rhine‑Westphalia in 1961, relevant to employment in NRW during the 1960s.

returned_title: Arbeitskräfte im Regierungsbezirk Münster und in ausgewählten Städten Nordrhein-Westfalens 1961
justification: GESIS study ZA0172 provides labour force statistics for the Regierungsbezirk Münster and selected NRW cities for 1961, aligning with employment in North Rhine‑Westphalia in the 1960s.

returned_title: Arbeitskräfte im Regierungsbezirk Arnsberg und in ausgewählten Städten Nordrhein-Westfalens 1961

returned_title: Arbeitskräfte im Regierungsbezirk Detmold und in ausgewählten Städten Nordrhein-Westfalens 1961
justification: Study ZA0174 gives labour force statistics for the Regierungsbezirk Detmold and selected cities in North Rhine‑Westphalia in 1961, providing employment‑related information for NRW in the early 1960s.

returned_title: German Federal Election 2021 (GLES 2021) – Rolling Cross-Section Campaign Survey (Pre- and Post-election)
justification: Contains detailed individual-level data on political behaviour, vote choice, campaign effects, and political attitudes in the 2021 federal election in Germany, fitting the topics of political behaviour, elections, and government/political systems in the 2020s.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2021 – Pre-election Cross-Section
justification: Focuses on voting behaviour, party preferences, and attitudes toward political institutions and democracy in Germany immediately before the 2021 federal election, directly addressing political behaviour and elections in the 2020s.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) 2021 – Post-election Cross-Section
justification: Provides representative post-election data on turnout, vote choice, coalition preferences, and evaluations of government and political actors for Germany’s 2021 federal election, matching the requested themes and period.

returned_title: German Federal Election 2021 – GLES 2021 Campaign Panel Survey
justification: Panel survey tracing individuals over the 2021 federal election campaign in Germany, with rich measures of political attitudes, participation, and reactions to parties and government, squarely about political behaviour and elections in the 2020s.

returned_title: GLES 2021 – Short-term Campaign Panel (Corona Panel Waves on the 2021 Federal Election)
justification: Examines political behaviour and attitudes during the COVID-19 context surrounding the 2021 German federal election, including evaluations of government performance and electoral choices, in Germany in the 2020s.

returned_title: German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES) – 2020 Corona Study, Waves on Political Attitudes and Behaviour
justification: COVID-19-related panel survey in Germany starting 2020, with repeated measures of trust in government, satisfaction with democracy, and political behaviour, directly related to political attitudes and government in the 2020s.

returned_title: GLES 2021 – Online Nonprobability Survey on the Federal Election
justification: Nonprobability online sample for the 2021 German federal election including vote intention, participation, and attitudes toward parties and political institutions, relevant to political behaviour and elections in Germany during the 2020s.

returned_title: German Federal Election 2021 – GLES 2021 Candidate Survey
justification: Survey of candidates in the 2021 federal election in Germany, covering their political attitudes, positions, and views on parties and parliament, relating to government and political systems and the electoral process in the 2020s.

returned_title: German Federal Election 2021 – GLES 2021 Constituency-Level Data
justification: Aggregated data at electoral district level for the 2021 German federal election, including vote shares, turnout, and contextual indicators, suitable for studying electoral behaviour and party system dynamics in the 2020s.

returned_title: State Parliament Election in Baden-Württemberg 2021 – Pre- and Post-election Study
justification: Covers individual political behaviour, vote choice, and attitudes toward state government and parties for the 2021 Baden-Württemberg state election in Germany, aligning with political behaviour, government, and elections in the 2020s.

returned_title: Gesundheit in Rheinland-Pfalz 2003
justification: State health survey for Rhineland-Palatinate (Rheinland-Pfalz) in the 2000s including questions on medication use, treatments, and specific diseases/health conditions among the population of the federal state.

returned_title: Gesundheit in Rheinland-Pfalz 2010
justification: Follow‑up health survey in Rhineland-Palatinate in the 2010s covering health status, chronic diseases, and utilization of medical treatment and medications among residents of the state.

returned_title: EU-SILC Zusatzerhebung 2004: Gesundheit (Deutschland)
justification: German EU-SILC health module from the 2000s with regional identifiers enabling analysis for Rhineland-Palatinate; includes long‑standing illness, chronic disease, and medical treatment/medication variables.

returned_title: EU-SILC Zusatzerhebung 2008: Gesundheit (Deutschland)
justification: German EU-SILC health module in the late 2000s including information on chronic conditions, limitations, and health care utilization; regional codes allow sub‑national analysis including Rhineland-Palatinate.

returned_title: EU-SILC Zusatzerhebung 2012: Gesundheit (Deutschland)
justification: EU-SILC health module in the early 2010s with variables on long‑term illness, specific conditions, and medical care; includes federal‑state identifiers to study Rhineland-Palatinate.

returned_title: Mikrozensus 2005 – Zusatzerhebung Gesundheit – Scientific Use File
justification: Large German health module in the mid‑2000s, containing questions on severe disability, chronic diseases, and medical treatment; regional variables permit analyses for Rhineland-Palatinate.

returned_title: Mikrozensus 2009 – Zusatzerhebung Gesundheit – Scientific Use File
justification: Health survey add‑on to the 2009 Microcensus, including specific illnesses and health‑care utilization; can be filtered for Rhineland-Palatinate using state identifiers.

returned_title: Mikrozensus 2013 – Zusatzerhebung Gesundheit – Scientific Use File
justification: 2010s Microcensus health module; records chronic conditions, disability and health care usage (including medication and treatment) with the possibility to analyze Rhineland-Palatinate via regional codes.

returned_title: German Ageing Survey (DEAS) 2002
justification: National ageing survey in the early 2000s with detailed information on chronic diseases, medical treatment, and medication of older adults; includes region variables so that Rhineland-Palatinate residents can be studied.

returned_title: German Ageing Survey (DEAS) 2011
justification: 2010s wave of the DEAS with extensive health measures, specific diagnosed diseases, and information on utilization of medical services and medications; sub‑national identifiers allow analysis for Rhineland-Palatinate.
